introSection: Medusa is a steel floorless roller coaster located at Six Flags Discovery Kingdom in Vallejo, California, USA. Opened in March 2000, it was the third Floorless Coaster installation from Bolliger & Mabillard.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
On November 10, 1999, Six Flags Marine World announced the addition of Medusa. It would be a custom floorless coaster built by Bolliger & Mabillard.

Medusa opened on March 18, 2000.

Towards the end of 2024, Medusa was closed to be repainted by Baynum Solutions. It was reopened in 2025.

fullText:
Medusa is a steel floorless roller coaster located at Six Flags Discovery Kingdom in Vallejo, California, USA. Opened in March 2000, it was the third Floorless Coaster installation from Bolliger & Mabillard.

On November 10, 1999, Six Flags Marine World announced the addition of Medusa. It would be a custom floorless coaster built by Bolliger & Mabillard.

Medusa opened on March 18, 2000.

Towards the end of 2024, Medusa was closed to be repainted by Baynum Solutions. It was reopened in 2025.



Lime track and purple supports.
